untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern requires multi-bar structural analysis: (1) identifying two distinct peaks with different shapes, (2) measuring valley depth between them (10-25%), (3) comparing peak-to-peak price variation (0-3%), (4) enforcing 2-6 week separation between peaks. Available indicators cannot track multi-bar peak/valley geometry, shape differences, or relative positioning across weeks. The pattern fundamentally requires candlestick pattern recognition across multiple bars, not single-bar or rolling-window indicators.
